gradient_history: GuessTheNumber SLM episodes wasted turns or repeated guesses: The prompt should force explicit interval tracking from higher/lower hints instead of unstructured guessing.
guess_the_number_strategy_prompt.name: guess_the_number_strategy_prompt
guess_the_number_strategy_prompt.role_description: TextArena GuessTheNumber action strategy for a frozen SLM.
guess_the_number_strategy_prompt.value:
Return one legal bracketed number. If uncertain, make conservative guesses from low to high and avoid prose.

Learned rules:
- For Guess The Number, track the current lower and upper bounds from every higher/lower hint, never repeat a previous guess, and choose the midpoint of the remaining interval.
